tagline: A Place to build your startup
mission: To drive innovation and entrepreneurship through a nurturing environment for early-stage startups.
national_recognition: National Award 2020 in the Emerging Technology Business Incubator category
core_offerings: Infrastructure: 24/7 workspace, high-speed Wi-Fi, meeting rooms, conference rooms, lockers, sports, cafeteria
Labs: Fabrication Lab (MIT FABLAB), Media Lab, AI/ML Lab, AR/VR Lab, Bio Lab (BIRAC-supported)
Funding connections: Angel investors and Venture Capitalist networks
Research hub with cutting-edge facilities and collaborative environment
Innovation programs turning bold ideas into groundbreaking solutions
Product design, UI/UX, and industrial aesthetics via Somaiya School of Design

laboratories.name: Fabrication Lab (FABLAB)
laboratories.description: Cutting-edge fabrication space with 3D printers and precision machines to transform ideas into prototypes and products.

laboratories.name: Media Lab
laboratories.description: Dynamic space with multimedia production tools for content creation, editing, and collaborative creative work.

laboratories.name: AI/ML Lab
laboratories.description: Advanced computing resources for exploring artificial intelligence and machine learning applications.

laboratories.name: AR/VR Lab
laboratories.description: Tools and environment for creating augmented and virtual reality experiences.

laboratories.name: Bio Lab
laboratories.description: Life sciences lab with cutting-edge equipment for biology, genetics, and biotechnology research. Connected to Bioriidl DIY Biolab.

support_entities: BIRAC (via Bio Lab and Bioriidl partnership)
bioriidl_connection: Bioriidl is riidl's dedicated bio-incubator and DIY biolab, providing specialized biotechnology incubation, IBSC regulatory support, and open-access biology workspace within the riidl ecosystem.
